one_time_description: Settlement claim received during the year
economic_notes: PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership (99%) and PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100%) established for development and management of own source revenue contracts and economic development opportunities. RBC Dominion Portfolio Investments of $20,559,260 acquired during the year, likely from settlement proceeds.
notes: Audit is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information (not a going concern qualification). Major one-time settlement claim of $21,428,571 dominates the year, causing accumulated surplus to jump from $2,078,305 to $23,900,553. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership and PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation. Portfolio investments of $20,599,370 acquired during the year primarily from RBC Dominion. ISC management review letter outstanding regarding possible funding repayment — no liability recorded. First Nation in violation of FNFTA submission deadline. Funds held in trust of $188,605 includes Ottawa Trust capital/revenue funds and legal retainer. No long-term debt. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Salaries total extracted from segmented schedule. Total government transfers include ISC $587,050 + FNHA $212,033 + Sto:lo $15,147 + Province of BC $416,948 = $1,231,178.
